notes: PLAY tab is now SP/CO-OP + MULTIPLAYER (locked) cards. Difficulty pick actually applies to the bot. EASY=clean arena, NORMAL=current, HARD=more beams, BRUTAL=max chaos. Sidebar polished — bigger animated triangle stage above the nickname, currency rows with accent bars, gradient panel body.
launcher_notes: Hardened self-update flow on Windows. Manifest now served from pulsewavegame.com with 30s cache.
